ddls:
CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of ability (e.g., fly, normal) */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Power points required to use the ability */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power rating of the ability */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the ability as a percentage */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the ability belongs to */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ability */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the ability's effect */,
  "recharge_time" INTEGER /* Time required before the ability can be used again */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., single, multiple, self) */,
  "status_effect_id" INTEGER /* ID of any status effect applied by the ability */,
  "is_aoe" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the ability affects an area of effect */,
  "cool_down" INTEGER /* Cool-down period after the ability is used */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana points required to use the ability */,
  "stamina_cost" INTEGER /* Stamina points required to use the ability */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abilities_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES ability_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ability_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class of ability */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is physical */,
  "is_magical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is magical */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack power of the character */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense power of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina points of the character */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence of the character */,
  "charisma" INTEGER /* Charisma of the character */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_abilities" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character using the ability */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability being used by the character */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the ability was used by the character */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the ability has been used by the character */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_balance" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability being balanced */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the balance */,
  "balance_rating" REAL /* Rating indicating the balance level of ability compared to character stats */,
  "balance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the balance rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the balance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_balance_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_balance_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the power type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power type */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the power type is physical */,
  "is_magical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the power type is magical */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the power type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ability_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability that applies the effect */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "effect_strength" REAL /* Strength of the effect (e.g., percentage of damage reduction) */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect (e.g., turns) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ability_effects_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle log entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who used the ability */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability used */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the ability usage (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ability was used */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Amount of damage dealt by the ability */,
  "healing_done" INTEGER /* Amount of healing done by the ability */,
  "status_effect_applied" TEXT /* Status effect applied by the ability */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target character */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_logs_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
